svg.title: Lead targeting agent three-phase pipeline
svg.desc: Phase 1 Find pulls from Google Maps, Apollo, and job boards. Phase 2 Enrich adds digital signals, financial, and technographic data. Phase 3 Score outputs a ranked lead list.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How exactly does the Lead Targeting agent use the Google Maps API to find businesses? What query parameters, what filters, and what data fields does it extract?')
sendPrompt('How does Apollo.io integrate with the Lead Targeting agent? What filters does it use and how does it avoid wasting credits on low-value leads?')
sendPrompt('What job boards does the Lead Targeting agent scrape and what specific job posting patterns signal that a company is likely to invest in AI automation?')
sendPrompt('How does the Lead Targeting agent analyze a company website to detect operational pain — outdated tech, manual processes, weak funnel? What tools does it use?')
sendPrompt('What financial indicators does the agent look for in a company to determine if they have the budget and readiness to spend on AI automation?')
sendPrompt('What does technographic enrichment mean in practice? What tools does the agent use to detect what software a company is currently using?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the exact lead scoring formula — what are the variables, weights, and how is the final 0-100 score calculated?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent tier leads into Hot / Warm / Cold buckets and route them to different outreach sequences?')
sendPrompt('What does the final lead record look like before it gets passed to the Outreach agent? What fields, what format, what context is included?')
sendPrompt('Show me the complete schema of the lead record that gets stored in Supabase — every field, type, and what populates it.')
g.text: Enriched profile · score · tier · context · contact info

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the CEO agent decide which hot leads to act on first? Does it use the score alone, or does it factor in region score, budget, and capacity?')
g.text: Approves top leads · activates outreach sequences

svg.text: Click any node to go deeper
